name: 37_Lane_Detection_ResNet50_TuSimple_DL
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa kugundua njia. Anza kwa kuingiza mfano wa kawaida wa ResNet-50 uliopangwa awali kutoka PyTorch katika `src/model.py`. Tutafanya kazi hapa na seti ya data ya kugundua njia ya TuSimple kama seti yetu ya majaribio, ambayo inapaswa kupakiwa kupitia `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha pakia na uandae seti ya data, ikijumuisha mbinu za kuongeza data kama vile kukata kwa nasibu, kuzungusha, na kupanua katika `src/data_loader.py`. Rekebisha mfano na uhifadhi usahihi wa kugundua katika `results/metrics/detection_accuracy.txt`, na uhifadhi mfano uliopangwa kama `models/saved_models/lane_detection_model.pth`. Gawa sehemu ndogo ya data kwa ajili ya uthibitishaji, iliyotekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Onyesha matokeo ya kugundua kwa kutumia matplotlib na uhifadhi katika `results/figures/`. Unda ripoti ya kina ya mchakato mzima, ikijumuisha uandaaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na tathmini, na uhifadhi kama `results/lane_detection_report.pdf`. Ripoti inapaswa pia kuchambua utendaji wa mfano chini ya hali ngumu kama vile mikunjo au mwanga hafifu.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya kugundua njia ya "TuSimple" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kuongeza data, ikijumuisha kukata kwa nasibu, kuzungusha, na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Sehemu ndogo ya data inagawanywa kwa ajili ya uthibitishaji na kutekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "ResNet-50" uliopangwa awali unaingizwa kutoka PyTorch katika `src/model.py`.
Rekebisha mfano wa "ResNet-50" na uhifadhi kama `models/saved_models/lane_detection_model.pth`.
Matokeo ya kugundua yanaonyeshwa kwa "matplotlib" na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.
Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha uandaaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/lane_detection_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha uchambuzi wa utendaji wa mfano katika hali ngumu, kama vile mikunjo au hali za mwanga hafifu.
Hatua za kuongeza data zinapaswa kuwa na maelezo mazuri, na mifano ya picha zilizoongezwa ijumuishwe katika ripoti.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya kugundua njia ya "TuSimple" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual TuSimple dataset loading. It only contains a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a `build_transforms()` function returning a simple list. There is no real TuSimple dataset loading logic — no file paths, no image reading, no annotation parsing, no `torch.utils.data.Dataset` subclass, and no actual data pipeline. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging," confirming it is not a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Kuongeza data, ikijumuisha kukata kwa nasibu, kuzungusha, na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder implementation. The `build_transforms()` function returns a simple list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` — this is not actual data augmentation code. There is no real implementation of random cropping (`RandomCrop`), rotation (`RandomRotation`), or scaling using libraries like `torchvision.transforms` or any other image processing library. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and a "placeholder," confirming that the required data augmentation functionality is not genuinely implemented.

judge_stats.criteria: Sehemu ndogo ya data inagawanywa kwa ajili ya uthibitishaji na kutekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. There is no actual validation split logic implemented — the file merely lists the requirement as a string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and provides a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`. There is no code that actually loads the TuSimple dataset, splits it into training/validation subsets (e.g., using `torch.utils.data.random_split` or similar), or performs any real data processing. The requirement is not functionally satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "ResNet-50" uliopangwa awali unaingizwa kutoka PyTorch katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not actually import or use the pre-trained ResNet-50 model from PyTorch. Instead, it contains only a placeholder implementation with a `KEYWORDS` list containing `"ResNet-50"` as a string, and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no actual `import` of `torchvision.models.resnet50` or any equivalent PyTorch ResNet-50 import. The code explicitly checks for `"resnet-18"` (not ResNet-50) in the keywords and returns `"model placeholder"` — confirming no real model is loaded.

judge_stats.criteria: Rekebisha mfano wa "ResNet-50" na uhifadhi kama `models/saved_models/lane_detection_model.pth`.

reason: <SATISFIED>: Faili `models/saved_models/lane_detection_model.pth` ipo katika muundo wa mradi kama inavyoonekana kwenye Project Tree. Ingawa hatuwezi kusoma maudhui ya faili ya `.pth` moja kwa moja, mwongozo unasema tunapaswa kudhani maudhui yake ni ya kuridhisha. Hii inaonyesha kwamba mfano umehifadhiwa katika njia sahihi iliyohitajika.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/detection_accuracy.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual lane detection accuracy metrics. This indicates the file was created but never populated with real detection accuracy results from model training or evaluation.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya kugundua yanaonyeshwa kwa "matplotlib" na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa matumizi ya `matplotlib` katika msimbo wowote uliotolewa (`data_loader.py` na `model.py`). Saraka ya `results/figures/` ipo lakini iko tupu — hakuna faili yoyote iliyohifadhiwa ndani yake. Faili zote mbili za msimbo ni "placeholder" tu zinazojaza mahitaji ya maneno bila utekelezaji halisi wa kuchora au kuhifadhi takwimu.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha uandaaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/lane_detection_report.pdf`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/lane_detection_report.pdf` exists in the project structure, but when its content was read, it returned an error: `'Error reading PDF file: Cannot read an empty file'`. This confirms that the PDF file is empty and does not contain any actual report content. Therefore, the requirement for a comprehensive report covering data preparation, model training, and evaluation process has not been met — the file exists in name only but lacks any substantive content.
